_comment: HITL Protocol v0.7 — Example: Quality Improvement Loop (Agent-Guided Iterative Enrichment)
scenario: A CV creation service returns a successful 201 response with a live CV URL, a claim token, and a quality_score. Alongside the result, the service includes improvement_suggestions — structured hints for the agent to collect additional data from the human. The agent shares the primary result first, then offers up to 2 improvement cycles. Each cycle: ask questions from agent_action, re-submit with enriched data, share updated result. Stop when suggestions are empty or maxAttempts reached.

steps.description: Agent POSTs CV data to the service. Service creates the CV immediately and returns 201 with the live URL, claim token, quality score, and improvement_suggestions.

improvement_suggestions.issue: No work experience — CV has low ATS compatibility
improvement_suggestions.agent_action: Ask: 'What positions have you held? Part-time, freelance, and internships all count — even if just a few months.'

improvement_suggestions.issue: No professional summary — the first thing recruiters read is missing
improvement_suggestions.agent_action: Ask: 'In 2–3 sentences, how would you describe yourself professionally? What are you best at and what are you looking for?'

body.next_steps: Share url and claim_token with the human first. Then optionally improve quality by asking the questions in each agent_action field.

steps.description: Agent shares primary result with human FIRST — before any improvement loop. This step is mandatory even if improvement_suggestions are present.

agent_action.message:
Your CV is live!

🔗 View it here: https://cvservice.example/pro/alex-johnson
🔑 Claim link (keep this safe): https://cvservice.example/claim/claim_xyz789abc

Current score: 35/100 (basic). Want me to improve it? I can ask a few quick questions.

steps.description: Human agrees to improve. Agent asks the first high-priority question from improvement_suggestions (experience). Cycle 1 begins.

agent_action.message: What positions have you held? Part-time, freelance, and internships all count — even if just a few months.

human_response.message: I worked as a Junior Developer at StartupX from 2022 to 2023, and before that I did a 6-month internship at TechCorp in 2021.

steps.description: Agent re-submits with enriched cv_data (experience added). Service returns updated CV — new cv_id, new url, improved quality_score. One suggestion remains.

improvement_suggestions.issue: No professional summary — the first thing recruiters read is missing
improvement_suggestions.agent_action: Ask: 'In 2–3 sentences, how would you describe yourself professionally? What are you best at and what are you looking for?'

steps.description: Agent shares updated result immediately, then asks the remaining question (summary). Cycle 2 begins.

agent_action.message:
Updated! Your score improved to 60/100 (good).

🔗 New link: https://cvservice.example/pro/alex-johnson-2

One more thing to boost it further: In 2–3 sentences, how would you describe yourself professionally? What are you best at and what are you looking for?

human_response.message: I'm a backend-focused software engineer with 2 years of experience in Python and Node.js. I enjoy building scalable APIs and working in agile teams. Currently looking for a mid-level role in Berlin or remote.

steps.description: Agent re-submits with enriched cv_data (summary added). Service returns final CV — quality_score 80, improvement_suggestions empty. maxAttempts (2) also reached. Loop ends.

cv_data.title: Software Engineer
cv_data.summary: Backend-focused software engineer with 2 years of experience in Python and Node.js. I enjoy building scalable APIs and working in agile teams. Currently looking for a mid-level role in Berlin or remote.

steps.description: improvement_suggestions is empty — loop exits cleanly. Agent shares final result. No more improvement cycles offered (would also have stopped at maxAttempts=2 regardless).

agent_action.message:
Your CV score is now 80/100 (excellent) — all done!

🔗 Final CV: https://cvservice.example/pro/alex-johnson-3
🔑 Claim link: https://cvservice.example/claim/claim_def456uvw

Keep the claim link safe — it gives full edit access and never expires.

agent_rules: Primary result MUST be shared after every 201 — never delay for improvement questions
Cap improvement cycles at maxAttempts (default: 2) — exit even if suggestions remain
Each re-request creates a new resource (new cv_id, new url) — share the updated URL each time
If human declines to answer improvement questions: stop the loop gracefully
improvement_suggestions is a service-level extension — not part of the HITL 202 flow
service_rules: Return 201 immediately — never block on improvement suggestions
improvement_suggestions are optional hints, not requirements
Each re-request is a fresh resource creation — return a new id and url
Stop returning suggestions once quality threshold is reached or no more improvements are possible
